tools.name: get_repository_tree
tools.description: Recursively walk the repository, filtering for files matching targeted extensions (.py, .js, .cpp, .txt). Obeys .gitignore rules and returns a lightweight structural hierarchical tree map string.

target_path.description: Absolute path to the repository directory to inspect.

tools.name: view_file_content
tools.description: Safely read a single targeted file path, with support for optional line-range slicing to return only the requested block.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the target file to view.

start_line.description: Optional start line number (1-indexed, inclusive) to begin slicing.

end_line.description: Optional end line number (1-indexed, inclusive) to end slicing.

tools.name: flag_dependency_drift
tools.description: Read the target manifest file (requirements.txt), extract version strings, and format them for agent auditing.

manifest_path.description: Absolute path to the dependency manifest file.
